<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        // Write packet_id as 4-byte integer
        stream.put(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
        
        // Write username with 2-byte prefix
        stream.put_fixedint(username.size(), 2);
        stream.write(username.data(), username.size());
        
        // Write scores count with 2-byte prefix, then each score as 4-byte integer
        stream.put_fixedint(scores.size(), 2);
        for (const auto& score : scores) {
            stream.put(&score, sizeof(score));
        }
        
        // Write metadata as null terminated string
        const char* metadata_data = metadata.c_str();
        stream.write(metadata_data, metadata.size() + 1); // includes null terminator
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::allocators/block_allocator<512> allocator;
    hexi::buffer_sequence buffer(allocator);
    hexi::stream_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    packet.serialise(adaptor);
    return buffer.to_vector();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <span>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    NetworkPacket packet;

    // Read packet ID (first 4 bytes)
    packet.packet_id = hexi::endian::le_to_native<std::uint32_t>(buffer.data() + 0);

    // Read username with length prefix
    const auto username_len = hexi::endian::le_to_native<std::uint32_t>(buffer.data() + 4);
    if (buffer.size() < 8 + username_len) [[unlikely]] {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer too small for username"));
    }
    packet.username = std::string{ reinterpret_cast<const char*>(buffer.data() + 8), username_len };

    // Read scores count
    const auto scores_count = hexi::endian::le_to_native<std::uint32_t>(buffer.data() + 8 + username_len);
    const auto scores_offset = 12 + username_len; // 4 (packet_id) + 4 (username_len) + username_len (username) + 4 (scores_count)
    if (buffer.size() < scores_offset + scores_count * sizeof(std::uint32_t)) [[unlikely]] {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer too small for scores"));
    }
    packet.scores.resize(scores_count);
    hexi::binary_stream_reader reader(buffer.subspan(scores_offset));
    reader >> hexi::adaptors::read_container(packet.scores);

    // Read metadata (null-terminated)
    auto metadata_start = scores_offset + scores_count * sizeof(std::uint32_t);
    auto pos = buffer.find_first_of(std::byte{0}, metadata_start);
    packet.metadata = std::string{ reinterpret_cast<const char*>(buffer.data() + metadata_start), pos };

    // Skip padding
    const auto padding_start = metadata_start + pos + 1;
    if (padding_start < buffer.size()) {
        hexi::null_buffer<> dummy;
        hexi::stream_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer.subspan(padding_start), dummy);
    }

    return packet;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    PacketInfo info;

    // Get packet ID via span
    info.packet_id = hexi::endian::le_to_native<std::uint32_t>(buffer.data() + 0);

    // Read username using prefixed adaptor
    std::string_view username;
    hexi::prefixed_adaptor<std::string_view> adaptor(4);
    try {
        adaptor.get(buffer, username, hexi::exception_tag());
    } catch (...) {
        HEXI_THROW(); // Propagate any exceptions
    }

    info.username = username;

    // Read scores count and skip data
    uint32_t scores_count = 0;
    hexi::endian::le_to_native(&scores_count, sizeof(scores_count), buffer.data() + 4 + username.size());

    const auto scores_offset = 8 + username.size(); // 4 (packet_id) + 4 (username prefix) + username.size()
    hexi::binary_stream_reader reader(buffer.subspan(scores_offset));
    reader.ignore(scores_count * sizeof(std::uint32_t));

    // Skip metadata and padding
    auto sub_buffer = buffer.subspan(scores_offset + scores_count * sizeof(std::uint32_t));
    auto pos = sub_buffer.find_first_of(std::byte{0});
    reader.ignore(pos + 1); // Skip metadata and null terminator

    const auto remaining = sub_buffer.size() - (pos + 1);
    if (remaining > 0) {
        reader.ignore(remaining); // Skip padding
    }

    return info;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct UserData {
    uint64_t user_id;
    uint8_t age;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream.put(user_id).put(age).put(name);
    }

    void deserialise(auto& stream) {
        stream.get(&user_id, sizeof(user_id))
            .get(&age, sizeof(age))
            .get(name);
    }
};

UserData deserialize_user_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::exception_tag allow_throw {};
    hexi::allocators::block_allocator<> allocator {};
    hexi::buffer_adaptor< std::span<const uint8_t> > buffer_adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream_reader reader(buffer_adaptor, &allocator, &allow_throw);

    UserData user;
    reader >> user.user_id >> user.age >> user.name;
    return user;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_buffer_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& source_buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor< const std::vector<uint8_t> > buffer(source_buffer);
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_read);
    buffer.read(destination.data(), bytes_to_read);
    return destination;
}

void write_buffer_data(std::vector<uint8_t>& dest_buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& source_data) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> buffer(dest_buffer);
    buffer.write(source_data.data(), source_data.size());
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <span>
#include <cassert>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

PacketHeader read_header_with_span(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    const auto min_req_size = sizeof(PacketHeader);
    if (buffer.size() < min_req_size) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer underrun: %zu byte read requested, buffer contains %zu bytes",
                                  min_req_size, buffer.size()));
    }

    hexi::buffer_adaptor< const uint8_t > buffer_adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer_adaptor);
    PacketHeader header{};
    stream >> header;
    
    // Validate the read boundary
    assert(stream.total_read() == min_req_size);
    return header;
}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    using namespace hexi;

    if (buffer.size() < 4) {
        return { 0, "" };
    }

    buffer_adaptor<read_tag> adaptor(buffer);
    uint32_t header = 0;
    adaptor.read(&header, sizeof(header));

    const auto remaining_data = buffer.data() + 4;
    const auto remaining_size = buffer.size() - 4;

    int null_terminator_pos = -1;
    for (int i = 0; i < remaining_size; ++i) {

#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_from_buffer(const hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_peek) {
    const auto read_ptr = buffer.read_ptr();
    const auto read_offset = buffer.read_offset();
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_peek);
    memcpy(destination.data(), read_ptr + read_offset, bytes_to_peek);
    return destination;
}

#include <hexi/dynamic_tls_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
hexi::dynamic_tls_buffer<block_size, allocator_count> create_tls_buffer() {
    return hexi::dynamic_tls_buffer<block_size, allocator_count>();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t element_count = 10>
void demonstrate_block_allocator_behavior() {
    hexi::block_allocator<int, element_count> allocator;

    // Initial allocation: creates a new block
    int* ptr1 = allocator.allocate();
    // Deallocate, pushing to free list
    allocator.deallocate(ptr1);

    // Subsequent allocation reuses the existing block
    ptr1 = allocator.allocate();
    allocator.deallocate(ptr1);

    // Further allocations and deallocations to demonstrate LIFO
    int* ptr2 = allocator.allocate();
    int* ptr3 = allocator.allocate();
    allocator.deallocate(ptr3); // Pushes ptr3 to head
    allocator.deallocate(ptr2); // Pushes ptr2 to head

    // Next allocations retrieve from the free list (LIFO order)
    ptr2 = allocator.allocate(); // Retrieves ptr2
    ptr3 = allocator.allocate(); // Retrieves ptr3
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <bit>
#include <type_traits>
#include <utility>
#include <cstdint>

template<typename T, typename U>
constexpr auto conditional_reverse(T t, std::endian from, std::endian to) {
    if(from != to) {
        if constexpr(std::is_same_v<U, float>) {
            return std::bit_cast<U>(std::bit_cast<std::uint32_t>(t) >> 8);
        } else if constexpr(std::is_same_v<U, double>) {
            return std::bit_cast<U>(std::bit_cast<std::uint64_t>(t) >> 8);
        } else {
            return std::bit_cast<U>(t);
        }
    } else {
        return t;
    }
}

template<decltype(auto) from, decltype(auto) to, typename T>
constexpr auto conditional_reverse(T t) {
    return conditional_reverse<from, to>(t);
}

template<typename T, typename U>
constexpr auto little_to(T t) {
    return conditional_reverse<std::endian::little, std::endian::native>(t);
}

template<typename T, typename U>
constexpr auto big_to(T t) {
    return conditional_reverse<std::endian::big, std::endian::native>(t);
}

template<typename T, typename U>
constexpr auto native_to_little(T t) {
    return conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(t);
}

template<typename T, typename U>
constexpr auto native_to_big(T t) {
    return conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::big>(t);
}

template<typename T, typename U, typename V>
constexpr auto conditional_reverse(T t, U from, V to) {
    if(from != to) {
        if constexpr(std::is_same_v<U, float>) {
            return std::bit_cast<V>(std::bit_cast<std::uint32_t>(t) >> 8);
        } else if constexpr(std::is_same_v<U, double>) {
            return std::bit_cast<V>(std::bit_cast<std::uint64_t>(t) >> 8);
        } else {
            return std::bit_cast<V>(t);
        }
    } else {
        return t;
    }
}

template<decltype(auto) from, decltype(auto) to, typename T, typename U>
constexpr auto conditional_reverse(T t, U& u) {

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    const auto read_ptr = storage.read_ptr();
    const auto read_offset = storage.read_offset();
    const auto read_size = storage.size();
    
    if(read_size < bytes_to_preview) {
        // Assuming the function should handle this case; problem may not specify error handling.
        // For the purpose of this solution, we'll proceed with the available data.
        bytes_to_preview = read_size;
    }
    
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_preview);
    memcpy(destination.data(), read_ptr + read_offset, bytes_to_preview);
    return destination;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferStatus<> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<1024>& storage) {
    BufferStatus<> status;
    status.readable_size = storage.size();
    status.free_space = storage.free();
    return status;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.reset();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_read);
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_read);
    buffer.read(destination.data(), destination.size());
    return destination;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_preview);
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_read);
    buffer.copy(destination.data(), destination.size());
    return destination;
}

void write_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_write);
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

size_t get_file_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_read);
    return buffer.size();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> target(bytes_to_read);
    buffer.read(target.data(), bytes_to_read);
    return target;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>

size_t get_stream_size(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    return stream.size();
}

bool is_stream_empty(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    return stream.empty();
}

struct StreamInfo {
    hexi::stream_state state;
    size_t buffer_size;
    bool is_empty;
};

StreamInfo get_stream_state_info(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    StreamInfo info;
    info.state = stream.state();
    info.buffer_size = stream.size();
    info.is_empty = stream.empty();
    return info;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void write_container_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::vector<uint32_t>& container) {
    const auto count = static_cast<std::uint32_t>(container.size());
    writer.write_fixed_length(&count, sizeof(count));
    for (const auto& element : container) {
        writer.write_fixed_length(&element, sizeof(element));
    }
}

std::vector<uint32_t> read_container_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    std::uint32_t count = 0;
    reader.read_fixed_length(&count, sizeof(count));
    std::vector<uint32_t> target(count);
    for (std::uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
        std::uint32_t element = 0;
        reader.read_fixed_length(&element, sizeof(element));
        target[i] = element;
    }
    return target;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t value, const void* data, std::size_t length) {
    buffer.write(&value, sizeof(value));
    buffer.write(data, length);
}

void read_data_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t& value, void* data, std::size_t length) {
    buffer.read(&value, sizeof(value));
    buffer.read(data, length);
}

struct BufferInfo {
    std::size_t size;
    std::size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo get_buffer_info(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    return {
        buffer.size(),
        buffer.capacity() - buffer.size()
    };
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void skip_bytes_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::size_t bytes) {
    buffer.skip(bytes);
}

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    MessageHeader header;
    uint16_t type = 0;
    buffer.get(&type, sizeof(type));
    header.message_type = ntohs(type);

    uint32_t length = 0;
    buffer.get(&length, sizeof(length));
    header.body_length = ntohl(length);

    buffer.skip(header.body_length);
    return header;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

const void* get_read_pointer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    return buffer.read_ptr();
}

struct BufferState {
    std::size_t size;
    const void* read_ptr;
    bool is_empty;
};

BufferState get_buffer_state(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    return {
        .size = buffer.size(),
        .read_ptr = buffer.read_ptr(),
        .is_empty = buffer.empty()
    };
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void clear_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    buffer.clear();
}

void conditional_clear_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    buffer.conditional_clear();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/shared.h>

#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>

#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    std::size_t written = 0;
    while (value > 0x7f) {
        const std::uint8_t byte = (value & 0x7f) | 0x80;
        writer.put(&byte, 1);
        value >>= 7;
        ++written;
    }

}

template<typename T>
T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    int shift { 0 };
    T value { 0 };
    std::uint8_t byte { 0 };

    do {
        byte = 0; // clear in case an error occurs
        reader.get(&byte, 1);
        value |= (static_cast<T>(byte & 0x7f) << shift);
        shift += 7;
    } while(byte & 0x80);

    return value;
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    std::vector<std::uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::uint8_t>> buffer_sequence(buffer);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream stream(buffer_sequence);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer = stream.get_writer();
    encode_varint(writer, original_value);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader = stream.get_reader();
    T decoded = decode_varint<T>(reader);
    return decoded == original_value;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    auto src_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(src);
    auto src_end = src_beg + src_len;
    auto dst_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(dst);
    auto dst_end = dst_beg + dst_len;
    return src_beg < dst_end && dst_beg < src_end;
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        std::memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        std::memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UnderrunInfo {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t buff_size;
    bool occurred;
};

UnderrunInfo catch_buffer_underrun() {
    UnderrunInfo info{0, 0, 0, false};
    try {
        // Assume this function is called within a try block where the exception is thrown
    } catch (const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
        info.read_size = e.read_size();
        info.total_read = e.total_read();
        info.buff_size = e.size();
        info.occurred = true;
    }
    return info;
}

UnderrunInfo safe_read_with_underrun_check(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, void* destination, std::size_t length) {
    UnderrunInfo info{0, 0, 0, false};
    try {
        buffer.read(destination, length);
    } catch (const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
        info.read_size = e.read_size();
        info.total_read = e.total_read();
        info.buff_size = e.size();
        info.occurred = true;
    }
    return info;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {

        e.total_read(),
        e.buff_size(),

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <span>
#include <vector>
#include <string>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;

    // Serialize packet ID as little-endian 4-byte integer
    const uint32_t packet_id_le = hexi::endian::native_to_little(packet.packet_id);
    buffer.insert(buffer.end(), reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&packet_id_le), sizeof(packet_id_le));

    // Serialize tags with prefixed varint encoding
    {
        auto write_prefixed_varint = [&](const std::size_t value) {
            std::vector<uint8_t> varint = hexi::detail::varint_encode(value);
            buffer.insert(buffer.end(), varint.size(), static_cast<uint8_t>(varint.size));
            buffer.insert(buffer.end(), varint.begin(), varint.end());
        };

        write_prefixed_varint(packet.tags.size());
        for (const auto& tag : packet.tags) {
            write_prefixed_varint(tag.size());
            buffer.insert(buffer.end(), tag.data().begin(), tag.data().end());
        }
    }

    // Serialize data with prefixed varint encoding
    {
        auto write_prefixed_varint = [&](const std::size_t value) {
            std::vector<uint8_t> varint = hexi::detail::varint_encode(value);
            buffer.insert(buffer.end(), varint.size(), static_cast<uint8_t>(varint.size));
            buffer.insert(buffer.end(), varint.begin(), varint.end());
        };

        write_prefixed_varint(packet.data.size());
        buffer.insert(buffer.end(), packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());
    }

    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    CompactPacket packet{};
    auto read_ptr = buffer.data();
    const auto read_limit = buffer.size();

    // Deserialize packet ID
    if (read_limit < 4) return packet;
    packet.packet_id = hexi::endian::little_to_native(*reinterpret_cast<const uint32_t>(read_ptr));
    read_ptr += 4;

    // Deserialize tags with prefixed varint decoding
    auto varint_decode = [&](char** strbuf, std::size_t* size) -> bool {
        const std::size_t prefix = read_ptr[0];
        if (read_limit < 1 + prefix) return false;
        *size = 0;
        for (const uint8_t byte : read_ptr[1..1+prefix]) {
            *size = (*size << 7) | (byte & 0x7f);
        }
        read_ptr += 1 + prefix;
        return true;
    };

    std::size_t size = 0;
    if (!varint_decode(&read_ptr, &size)) return packet;
    packet.tags.resize_and_overwrite(size, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
        if (read_limit < size) return size;
        memcpy(strbuf, read_ptr, size);
        read_ptr += size;
        return size;
    });

    // Deserialize data with prefixed varint decoding
    if (!varint_decode(&read_ptr, &size)) return packet;
    packet.data.resize_and_overwrite(size, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
        if (read_limit < size) return size;
        memcpy(strbuf, read_ptr, size);
        read_ptr += size;
        return size;
    });

    return packet;
}

// Helper function to varint encode a value
[[hexi::no_throw]] std::vector<uint8_t> varint_encode(std::size_t value) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    while (value > 0x7f) {
        const std::uint8_t byte = (value & 0x7f) | 0x80;
        buffer.push_back(byte);
        value >>= 7;
    }
    const std::uint8_t byte = value & 0x7f;
    buffer.push_back(byte);
    return buffer;
}

// Helper function to varint decode a value
[[hexi::no_throw]] std::size_t varint_decode(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    int shift { 0 };
    std::size_t value { 0 };
    std::uint8_t byte { 0 };

    for (const auto& b : buffer) {
        value |= (static_cast<std::size_t>(b & 0x7f) << shift);
        shift += 7;
        if (!(b & 0x80)) break;
    }
    return value;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator<> allocator;
    auto buffer = allocator.allocate<hexi::dynamic_buffer>();
    
    hexi::stream_writer writer(*buffer);
    writer.exceptions(hexi::no_throw);
    
    // Write header (2 bytes)
    writer.put(packet.header);
    
    // Write data with 4-byte prefix
    const auto data_size = packet.data.size();
    writer.put(hexi::fixed<4>(data_size));
    writer.put(packet.data);
    
    // Write 16-byte padding filled with 0x00
    writer.put(hexi::fill<16>(0x00));
    
    // Write footer (4 bytes)
    writer.put(packet.footer);
    
    // Convert buffer to vector
    auto bytes = buffer->read_data();
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(bytes, bytes + buffer->size());
    
    allocator.deallocate(buffer);
    return result;
}
```</answer>

    std::vector<uint8_t> result(write_size);
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer);
    read_adaptor.read(result.data(), result.size());
    return result;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_without_advancing(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer_data, std::size_t peek_size) {

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>

#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <cstddef>

std::size_t write_multiple_chunks(const std::vector<std::vector<std::byte>>& chunks) {

            // For the problem's context, we'll assume sufficient space
        }
        buffer.write(chunk.data(), chunk.size());
    }
    
    return buffer.size();
}

std::vector<std::byte> read_partial_data(const std::vector<std::byte>& buffer, std::size_t chunk_size) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor read_buffer(buffer);
    std::vector<std::byte> result;
    
    while (read_buffer->size() > 0) {
        const auto read_max = read_buffer->size();
        const auto read_len = read_max < chunk_size ? read_max : chunk_size;
        
        result.resize_and_overwrite(read_len, [&](char* target, std::size_t size) {
            read_buffer->read(target, size);
            return size;
        });
    }
    
    return result;
}

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct Header {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
};

Header peek_header_without_reading(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    Header header{};
    adaptor.copy(&header, sizeof(header));
    return header;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_then_conditionally_read(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    uint8_t first_byte = 0;
    adaptor.copy(&first_byte, 1);

    if (first_byte == 0x7f) { // Example condition
        std::vector<uint8_t> data(5); // Read 5 bytes if condition met
        adaptor.read(data.data(), data.size());
        return data;
    } else {
        return {};
    }
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_write.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/concepts>
#include <concepts>
#include <vector>
#include <span>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer(hexi::no_throw_t());
    hexi::pmc::stream_write& stream = buffer.write_stream();
    
    // Serialize message_id with endianness conversion
    const auto big_endian_msg_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.put(&big_endian_msg_id, sizeof(big_endian_msg_id));
    
    // Serialize data_values with endianness conversion
    std::vector<uint16_t> swapped_data;
    swapped_data.reserve(packet.data_values.size());
    for (auto val : packet.data_values) {
        swapped_data.emplace_back(hexi::endian::native_to_big(val));
    }
    stream.put_container(swapped_data.data(), swapped_data.size());
    
    // Serialize checksum with endianness conversion
    const auto big_endian_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.put(&big_endian_checksum, sizeof(big_endian_checksum));
    
    return buffer.to_vector();
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolPacket packet{};
    hexi::pmc::stream_read& stream = *new hexi::pmc::stream_read(buffer);
    
    // Deserialize message_id
    uint32_t swapped_msg_id = 0;
    stream.get(&swapped_msg_id, sizeof(swapped_msg_id));
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(swapped_msg_id);
    
    // Deserialize data_values count
    uint32_t count = 0;
    stream.get(&count, sizeof(count));
    count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(count);
    
    // Deserialize data_values
    packet.data_values.resize(count);
    stream.get_container(packet.data_values.data(), count);
    for (auto& val : packet.data_values) {
        val = hexi::endian::big_to_native(val);
    }
    
    // Deserialize checksum
    uint32_t swapped_checksum = 0;
    stream.get(&swapped_checksum, sizeof(swapped_checksum));
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(swapped_checksum);
    
    return packet;
}

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolHeader header{};
    hexi::pmc::stream_read& stream = *new hexi::pmc::stream_read(buffer);
    
    // Read message_id with endianness conversion
    const auto header_data = buffer.first<4>();
    header.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(*reinterpret_cast<const uint32_t>(header_data.data()));
    
    // Skip the header
    stream.skip(4);
    
    return header;
}
```</answer>

    stream.put(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
    for (const auto& temp : temperatures) {
        const auto swapped = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<endian::native, endian::little>(temp);
        stream.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));

    stream.put(&swapped_pressure, sizeof(swapped_pressure));
}

    stream.get(&pressure, sizeof(pressure));

}
